entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 45
entries.excerpt: Movingly Judah spoke to Joseph, until Joseph was overcome by love for his brothers; he not only restored Benjamin to them, as they had hoped, but revealed himself to them, which they had not expected. Joseph ordered all to be sent away from him, for over a feigned crime he had judged them in front of all; intending to judge them in an actual crime, he wished to remove all the witnesses. When all in wonder had withdrawn, then he changed his language and voice, and now without an interpreter, in the Hebrew tongue, he said: “I am Joseph your brother.…
